description_long: This is a pair of low-top athletic sneakers featuring a vibrant green and black color scheme with lime green laces and trim. The upper is primarily constructed from green fabric panels, complemented by black overlays around the toe, eyelets, and heel. The shoes have a white rubber sole with a thin black stripe running along the edge, providing a classic streetwear look. The tongue and heel tab display a distinctive alien head logo in white, adding a unique branding element. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall build suggests durability and everyday wear. These shoes are suitable for casual urban environments, offering both style and practicality.
description: A pair of green and black low-top sneakers with lime green laces, white soles, and an alien head logo on the tongue and heel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lime green laces, black toe caps, and alien head logo on the tongue.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green fabric panels, black overlays, and the white rubber sole with a black stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the alien head logo and branding on the heel tab, as well as the padded collar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same green and black color blocking and the clean, low-profile silhouette.
attribute_logo: Alien head logo in white on the tongue and heel tab
